summary: US Treasuries were set to end June with a modest gain thanks to a collapse in inflation expectations, ending the market’s performance drought over the first five months of the year.

title: BDC Veteran Tannenbaum Plans Comeback to Industry Near ‘Crisis’

title: Oil Set for Quarterly Drop as Morgan Stanley Warns of Glut Risks
title_cn: 摩根士丹利警告过剩风险，油价将出现季度下跌
summary: Oil swung but still headed for the biggest quarterly decline since the pandemic, with flows through the Strait of Hormuz picking up on hopes for a permanent US-Iran deal and a Wall Street bank issuing fresh warnings about a potential glut.

title: World Bank Approves $750 Million Kenya Deal, Agrees to Back
title_cn: 世界银行批准肯尼亚 7.5 亿美元交易并同意支持
summary: The World Bank approved a long-awaited $750 million loan to Kenya in support of reforms aimed at enhancing good governance and improving public-finance management.

title: 'Circumstances Don't Call for Rate Hikes Right Now' Says Win Thin
title_cn: 温薄表示，“目前情况并不需要加息”
summary:
The yen’s descent to a four-decade low is the talk of currency markets today, and the next big trigger for the selloff may be whether Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh keeps up his hawkish tone at the Sintra policymaker forum.
Win Thin, Chief Economist at Bank of Nassau, discusses the Yen, as well as his outlook on rates under new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The World Cup’s Ticket Pricing Gamble Paid Off
title_cn: 世界杯门票定价赌博得到了回报
summary: FIFA’s dynamic pricing strategy has angered fans but it’s helping generate record revenues, explains Bloomberg Opinion’s Juan Pablo Spinetto. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Advance as Indexes Head for Best Quarter Since 2020
title_cn: 美股上涨，指数迎来 2020 年以来最佳季度表现
summary: US stocks advanced on Tuesday as the main indexes zeroed in on their best quarter in six years and traders parsed the latest economic data.

title: YOLO Crowd Wants Little to Do With Tech Megacaps It Once Adored
title_cn: YOLO Crowd 不再希望与它曾经崇拜的科技巨头有任何关系
summary: Retail investors’ activity in the technology stocks known as the “Magnificent Seven” hit a four-year low in recent days after having been muted for months, according to Citigroup Inc. equity strategists.

title: India to Get Below Normal Rain in July, Risking Crop Outlook
title_cn: 印度七月降雨量将低于正常水平，农作物前景面临风险
summary: India is likely to receive below-normal rainfall in July, the monsoon’s wettest month, after its driest June in 12 years, threatening to further delay crop planting across large parts of the country.

title: Comcast’s NBC Spinoff Sets Stage for More Media, Broadband Deals
title_cn: 康卡斯特分拆 NBC 为更多媒体、宽带交易奠定基础
summary:
Comcast announced on Monday that it will spin off NBCUniversal and its European media unit, Sky, into a separate, independently traded company. Comcast will hang onto its cable-TV, broadband and wireless businesses. 
Chris Marangi, Co-CIO: Value at Gabelli Funds, and Bloomberg 'Wall Street Week' host David Westin discuss the broader media landscape and how this spinoff fits into the recent consolidation trend we've seen in the space. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazilian Real Becomes ‘Collateral Damage’ as Dollar Roars Back
title_cn: 美元飙升，巴西雷亚尔成为“附带损害”
summary: The Brazilian real is heading for its worst month this year as a rebound in the dollar and shifting interest-rate expectations push investors to unwind one of their most favored carry trades.

title: Oil Driller Sable Sinks 47% as It Struggles to Repay Exxon Loan
title_cn: 石油钻探商 Sable 因难以偿还埃克森美孚贷款而股价下跌 47%
summary: Sable Offshore Corp., briefly buoyed by a Trump administration push to boost oil production off the California coast, saw its shares sink to a record low after it turned to equity and bond investors to repay debt owed to Exxon Mobil Corp.

title: South Africa Court Drops Credit Suisse From Rand-Fixing Suit
title_cn: 南非法院撤销瑞士信贷集团操纵兰特的诉讼
summary: South Africa’s Constitutional Court dismissed Credit Suisse Group AG from a suit alleging that the Swiss bank and others had manipulated the rand-dollar exchange rate for six years through at least September 2013.

title: Concentrix Slides on Outlook; AeroVironment Jumps on Earnings | Stock Movers
title_cn: Outlook 上的 Concentrix 幻灯片； AeroVironment 盈利大幅增长 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers:

- Concentrix (CNXC) shares are sliding after the call-center company slashed its full-year outlook. Its forecasts for reported revenue and adjusted earnings per share also undershot Wall Street’s expectations. 
- AeroVironment (AVAV) shares are jumping after the defense company reported fourth-quarter results that topped expectations across key metrics and forecast 2027 revenue that at the midpoint exceeded analysts’ estimate.
- Digital Reality (DLR) shares are lower on news it will buy a Blackstone data center stake for $3.5 billion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Congo Orders Cobalt Miners to Give Up Unused Export Quotas
title_cn: 刚果命令钴矿商放弃未使用的出口配额
summary: Cobalt miners in the Democratic Republic of Congo will be required to surrender unused export quotas for the first half of the year to a government regulator, likely adding to tightness in the market for the battery metal.

title: Why Millennium Is Backing Citadel Alum’s Quant Hedge Fund Firm
title_cn: 为什么 Millennium 支持 Citadel Alum 的量化对冲基金公司
summary: Millennium Management will back a new quantitative hedge fund firm led by former Citadel researcher Paul Dou, which may oversee more than $1 billion for the giant over time, said people with knowledge of the matter. Nishant Kumar reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Susquehanna Says It Lost Millions to Mystery Insider Traders
title_cn: 萨斯奎哈纳称其因神秘内幕交易者损失了数百万美元
summary: Susquehanna Investment Group is attempting to unmask the identities of individuals it claims made at least $100 million trading on inside information about a Chinese government crackdown on cross-border brokerages last month.

title: Central Banks Plan to Reduce Dollar Holdings, Survey Says
title_cn: 调查显示各国央行计划减少美元持有量
summary: For the first time in three years, global central banks plan to reduce their exposure to the US dollar in the long term, according to a UK-based think tank.

title: SEC Mulls New ETF Rules as $16 Trillion Boom Disrupts Status Quo
title_cn: 16 万亿美元的繁荣扰乱了现状，SEC 正在考虑新的 ETF 规则
summary: The US Securities and Exchange Commission is signaling a potential rethink of how it oversees exchange-traded funds after a recent wave of filings for prediction-market ETFs prompted fresh scrutiny of the existing regulatory framework.

title: Venezuela Bond Rally Fades as Investors Price in Bleaker Outlook
title_cn: 投资者认为前景黯淡，委内瑞拉债券涨势消退
summary: Venezuelan bonds are tumbling as investors factor in a bleaker financial outlook after two devastating earthquakes added to the challenges of a sweeping debt restructuring.

title: Schwab CEO on Why They Keep Fees Low
title_cn: 施瓦布首席执行官谈为什么他们保持低费用
summary: Charles Schwab President & CEO Rick Wurster discusses the biggest challenge he faces and shares a story about founder Chuck Schwab that illustrates the company's unwavering, client-first philosophy, one that prioritizes value and scale and long-term growth over short-term profits. Wurster is on this week's episode of Bloomberg Wealth. This interview was recorded May 1 in New York.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Biscoff Maker Lotus Up 600% in Tough Decade for Snack Firms
title_cn: Biscoff Maker Lotus 在零食公司艰难的十年里上涨了 600%
summary: Soaring global sales of Biscoff cookies are helping a Belgian food company extend a remarkable decade of stock market outperformance.

title: UK ‘Minded to Intervene’ in Paramount’s Warner Bros. Deal Over Media Ownership Concerns
title_cn: 英国因媒体所有权问题“有意干预”派拉蒙与华纳兄弟的交易
summary: Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. could face an intervention from the UK government after the country’s culture and media secretary raised concerns over the diversity of media ownership.

title: Raizen Cuts Investment, Says ‘Most Acute’ Cash Pressure Is Past
title_cn: Raizen削减投资，称“最严重”的现金压力已经过去
summary: Brazilian sugar and fuels company Raizen SA is further cutting spending this year after reporting a quarterly cash burn and roughly doubling its impairment charge for the crop year.

title: Chip Stocks’ Best Quarter Ever Is Ending With Some Wild Swings
title_cn: 芯片股有史以来最好的一个季度以剧烈波动结束
summary: Chip stocks are heading for their best quarter ever, extending an extraordinary start to the year driven by insatiable demand for artificial intelligence equipment. But after recent jitters sent the stocks tumbling, investors are wondering how much further the rally can go.

title: Kalshi Finagled a World Cup Sponsorship Deal at a Deep Discount
title_cn: 卡尔希以大幅折扣达成世界杯赞助协议
summary: When the World Cup knockout round began Sunday, Kalshi joined the likes of Coca-Cola, Visa and Adidas with sideline advertising in the stadiums — an unusual addition, given that the event is halfway over, and also that FIFA already signed up an “official prediction markets partner” in ADI Predictstreet, a startup with ties to the Abu Dhabi royal family.

title: AI Won’t Be Substitute for Human Workers, OpenAI Economist Says
title_cn: OpenAI 经济学家表示，人工智能不会取代人类工人
summary: The rise of artificial intelligence won’t make human workers superfluous, according to OpenAI Chief Economist Ronnie Chatterji.

title: Sovereign Funds Back Private Credit
title_cn: 主权基金支持私人信贷
summary: Institutional investors are doubling down on private credit even as retail investors grow more cautious. Bloomberg's Silas Brown joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why sovereign wealth funds continue shifting into private markets, how fundraising is separating industry leaders from the rest, and why AI is emerging as the next major opportunity for private equity and private credit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP Gives AI Product Oversight to CEO and COO in Reshuffle
title_cn: SAP在重组中将人工智能产品监督权交给首席执行官和首席运营官
summary: SAP SE is divvying up responsibilities for its product and engineering functions in its second top-level reorganization this year, people familiar with the matter said, as Europe’s largest software company grapples with staying ahead of rising artificial intelligence competition.

title: Bloomberg Invest Hong Kong 2026 Highlights
title_cn: 彭博投资香港 2026 年亮点
summary: From market outlook and cross-border flows to private capital, IPO momentum, China opportunities and AI infrastructure, Bloomberg Invest Hong Kong 2026 convened allocators, dealmakers and investors for conversations on the forces shaping Asia’s markets.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spain's War on Football Piracy Knocks Legitimate Sites Offline
title_cn: 西班牙打击足球盗版的战争导致合法网站下线
summary: From small businesses to government agencies, legitimate websites are getting caught in the crossfire of LaLiga's fight against illegal sports streams

title: Call Center Stocks Fall on Fear AI Makes Them ‘Uninvestible’
title_cn: 呼叫中心股票因恐惧人工智能而下跌，使它们“不可投资”
summary: Signs that companies are increasingly turning to artificial intelligence to handle customer service tasks has triggered a fresh selloff in shares of two call-center companies.

title: Exiled Chinese Tycoon Gets 30 Years in Prison for Billion-Dollar Fraud
title_cn: 流亡中国大亨因数十亿美元欺诈被判入狱 30 年
summary: Exiled Chinese tycoon Miles Guo, who promoted himself as a crusader against the communist government in Beijing, was ordered to spend 30 years in a US prison for duping investors out of $1 billion.

title: AI Chip Startup Etched Lures Jane Street, TSMC-Linked VC as Investors
title_cn: AI 芯片初创公司 Etched 吸引 Jane Street 和台积电相关风险投资公司作为投资者
summary: Nvidia rival says it has raised $800 million and has $1 billion in contracts.

title: Dan Ives Expects Mag 7 to ‘Significantly’ Outperform in Second Half
title_cn: 丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 预计 Mag 7 下半场将“显着”跑赢大盘
summary: Dan Ives, global head of tech research and senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, sees the upcoming earnings season as a “huge validation moment” for big tech stocks, which he says were “way oversold in June.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Left Mirae With No Shares on Misunderstanding
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股因误解导致 Mirae 没有股票
summary: It was supposed to be the deal that vaulted Mirae Asset Securities Co. into the global big leagues.

title: AI Leverage Is More Worrying Than Valuations, IMF’s Adrian Says
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织阿德里安表示，人工智能杠杆比估值更令人担忧
summary: Artificial intelligence debt issuance may point to more of a financial stability concern than stock valuations, according to a senior International Monetary Fund official.

title: BOE’s Breeden Says AI Agents Could Amplify Market Stress
title_cn: 京东方的布里登表示人工智能代理可能会加剧市场压力
summary: Bank of England Deputy Governor Sarah Breeden says the use of autonomous artificial intelligence agents “could amplify volatility in stress” in financial markets and may need tighter regulation. She speaks at the European Central Bank's annual symposium in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BOE’s Breeden Warns AI Agents Risk Causing Market Meltdowns
title_cn: 京东方的 Breeden 警告人工智能代理存在导致市场崩溃的风险
summary: Autonomous artificial intelligence agents risk causing “market meltdown” and may need tighter regulation, Bank of England Deputy Governor Sarah Breeden warned.

title: Jon and Mindy Gray Bet on AI Science Research to Prevent Cancer
title_cn: Jon 和 Mindy Gray 押注人工智能科学研究来预防癌症
summary: Blackstone Inc. President Jon Gray has steered his firm to more artificial-intelligence investments, and the same is true with his science philanthropy.

title: Chinese AI Firms’ Newest Battleground: World Cup Predictions
title_cn: 中国AI企业的最新战场：世界杯预测
summary: The companies are using interest in the popular sporting event to promote their AI models

title: AI Notetakers in Meetings Raise Mounting Privacy Concerns
title_cn: 会议中的人工智能笔记员提出了越来越多的隐私问题
summary: Executives and companies are grappling with how to manage the tools’ often uninvited presence.

title: IMF: Cyberattacks Getting Faster
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织：网络攻击速度越来越快
summary:
The time between a software vulnerability being found and then exploited by a bad actor is shrinking says Tobias Adrian, Financial Counsellor and Director of the Monetary and Capital Markets Department at the International Monetary Fund. This poses a real threat to financial stability, says Adrian. He spoke to Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua on the sidelines of the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra on 'The Pulse'. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lee’s $880 Billion AI Bet Ties Legacy to South Korea Chip Boom
title_cn: Lee 的 8800 亿美元 AI 赌注将遗产与韩国芯片热潮联系在一起
summary: With South Korea already one of the biggest winners of the global AI boom, President Lee Jae Myung is now staking his legacy on a plan to transform the nation’s less developed southwest into a global chip hub.

title: Weak Hiring Is Hurting Young Workers More than AI, Study Says
title_cn: 研究称，招聘疲软对年轻工人的伤害比人工智能更大
summary: A shortage of job openings in the US is playing a much bigger role in young people’s unemployment than their lack of artificial intelligence skills, according to a new study from the Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis.

title: Equirus Is Said to Consider Fundraising at $600 Million Value
title_cn: 据称 Equirus 正在考虑筹集价值 6 亿美元的资金
summary: Equirus Capital Pvt is considering raising as much as $60 million in a funding round, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Midea Is Said to Consider China IPO for German Robot Maker Kuka
title_cn: 传美的考虑让德国机器人制造商库卡在中国IPO
summary: Midea Group Co. is considering listing German robot maker Kuka in mainland China, according to people familiar with the matter, a decade after acquiring the company.

title: The Original Prediction Market Boosters Have Qualms About the Boom
title_cn: 最初的预测市场推动者对繁荣抱有疑虑
summary: At Manifest, some tech intellectuals wondered whether Super Bowl bets were really helping humanity.

title: What the Saga Over Anthropic’s Mythos Tells Us About the Cyber Risks From AI
title_cn: 关于人类神话的传奇故事告诉我们关于人工智能的网络风险
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its Mythos artificial intelligence model is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. As of early June, the AI giant had released Mythos to only 200 partner organizations because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic said, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: Citi’s Chew Sees Selloff Risk in Tech Stocks From Positioning
title_cn: 花旗集团的 Chew 从仓位中看到科技股面临抛售风险
summary: US technology shares are at risk of further declines as overall investor exposure to the cohort is still elevated, according to Citigroup Inc. strategists.

title: M&G's Fedeli Says Its Worth Investing in 'AI Losers'
title_cn: M&G 的 Fedeli 表示值得投资“人工智能失败者”
summary: Fabiana Fedeli, CIO of multi-asset at M&G Investments, says that while there is still value in equities, markets such as South Korea have displayed "exuberant" behavior. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, she says: "there is a whole host of stocks which are the AI losers — the stocks that have been forgotten by the AI trade — that I still think I still think are very worthwhile investing in." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NeoPulse-Led Group to Acquire Stake in Korean Game Maker Wemade
title_cn: NeoPulse 领导的集团将收购韩国游戏制造商 Wemade 的股份
summary: A consortium led by NeoPulse is close to a deal to buy nearly 40% of South Korean firm Wemade Co. from founder and Chairman Park Kwan-ho, a spokesman for Wemade said in response to a Bloomberg News query.

title: AirPods Maker Luxshare Seeks Up to $3.1 Billion From Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: AirPods 制造商立讯精密寻求在香港上市筹集高达 31 亿美元的资金
summary: Tuesday got off to a busy start in Hong Kong, with a wave of companies including Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. taking orders for listings worth a combined $6 billion.

title: Singtel CEO’s Pay Cut 17% to $5.3 Million After Network Outages
title_cn: 网络中断后新加坡电信首席执行官减薪 17% 至 530 万美元
summary: Singapore Telecommunications Ltd. cut Group Chief Executive Officer Yuen Kuan Moon’s pay by 17% after a year marked by emergency service disruption and network outages in Australia and Singapore.

title: Taiwan Opposition’s $7.5 Billion Plan Stirs Drone Defense Debate
title_cn: 台湾反对派75亿美元计划引发无人机防御争论
summary: Taiwan’s main opposition party outlined plans to develop the drone industry just days after stalling a similar proposal from President Lai Ching-te’s government, amid a debate on unmanned systems with crucial implications for the island’s defense.

title: New Jersey’s Kean Says He Was Treated for Depression
title_cn: 新泽西州的基恩说他接受了抑郁症治疗
summary: New Jersey Representative Tom Kean Jr. revealed that he has been treated for depression as he returned to the US House for the first time in nearly four months.

title: Anti-Migrant Protests Draw Thousands Across South Africa
title_cn: 南非各地数千人举行反移民抗议活动
summary: Thousands of people joined anti-migrant protests in South Africa on Tuesday, watched over by a massive police contingent that was deployed to prevent violence and intimidation.

title: GOP Picks Dallas for Trump’s September Midterm Convention
title_cn: 共和党选择达拉斯参加特朗普九月中期代表大会
summary: Republicans will host a midterm convention in Dallas on Sept. 9-10, according to a person familiar with the event President Donald Trump first floated last year as a way of rallying GOP voters.

title: Supreme Court Lets States Ban Trans Athletes in Female Teams
title_cn: 最高法院允许各州禁止女队中的跨性别运动员
summary: A divided US Supreme Court upheld state laws that ban transgender girls and women from competing for their schools on female athletic teams, siding with conservatives and President Donald Trump on a divisive culture war issue.

title: Supreme Court Backs Birthright Citizenship in Blow to Trump
title_cn: 最高法院支持出生公民权，对特朗普构成打击
summary: A divided US Supreme Court upheld the constitutional right of birthright citizenship, rejecting President Donald Trump’s planned restrictions and invalidating a central plank of his immigration agenda.

title: Understanding the Long Fight Over Birthright Citizenship
title_cn: 了解关于出生公民权的长期斗争
summary: In rejecting President Donald Trump’s attempt to end automatic US citizenship for children born to parents who are in the country unlawfully or on temporary visas, the Supreme Court on June 30 upheld more than a century of legal precedent. There have been previous efforts to put restrictions on birthright citizenship dating back to decades after the concept was enshrined in the US Constitution. The Supreme Court has asserted, again, that such attempts can’t be squared with the document’s 14th Am

title: Trump Administration’s Homelessness Funding Rule Struck Down
title_cn: 特朗普政府的无家可归者资助规则被废除
summary: A judge struck down the Trump administration’s changes to a widely used federal housing-assistance program that put at risk more than $3 billion in funds to fight homelessness, ruling the government had failed to consider the impact on families who rely on such help.

title: Denmark Adds $670 Million to Its Support for Ukraine Military
title_cn: 丹麦追加 6.7 亿美元支持乌克兰军事
summary: Denmark said it will provide Ukraine with an additional 4.4 billion kroner ($670 million) in military support, underscoring its commitment to the country as the war to defend itself against Russia drags on.

title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Have 30,000 Fighters, UN Experts Say
title_cn: 联合国专家称卢旺达支持的叛军拥有 30,000 名战士
summary: Rwanda-backed M23 rebels who occupy a large part of eastern Democratic Republic of Congo have built a force of around 30,000 troops and are consolidating their hold on the region, according to United Nations’ experts.

title: Ebola Cases Traced to Congo Province Bordering on South Sudan
title_cn: 埃博拉病例追溯到与南苏丹接壤的刚果省
summary: Three people exposed to the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo have been traced to a province bordering South Sudan, increasing the chances the virus could spill into one of the world’s most fragile states.

title: Supreme Court Strikes Down Trump’s Birthright Citizenship Curbs
title_cn: 最高法院推翻了特朗普的出生权公民身份限制
summary:
A divided US Supreme Court rejected President Donald Trump’s planned restrictions on birthright citizenship, invalidating a central plank of his immigration agenda. 
Bloomberg Law Host June Grasso and Leon Fresco, Partner at Holland & Knight, discuss the ruling. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NY-NJ Gateway Tunnel Funding Freeze Ruled Flagrantly Illegal
title_cn: 纽约-新泽西网关隧道资金冻结被裁定为公然非法
summary: A federal judge ruled the Trump administration must continue providing federal funds for the $16 billion Gateway tunnel under the Hudson River, saying that stopping the payments “flagrantly” violated the law.

title: Trump Pauses Moroccan Fertilizer Duties to Aid Farm Economy
title_cn: 特朗普暂停摩洛哥化肥税以援助农业经济
summary: President Donald Trump will temporarily lift duties on phosphate fertilizer from Morocco as the administration seeks to aid a struggling farm economy and ease consumer fears over food inflation.

title: US Supreme Court Rejects Trump’s Birthright Citizenship Curbs
title_cn: 美国最高法院驳回特朗普的出生权公民限制
summary: A divided US Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump’s planned restrictions on birthright citizenship, saying an executive order Trump issued hours after his inauguration last year couldn’t be squared with the Constitution’s 14th Amendment. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Voids Political-Party Spending Caps
title_cn: 最高法院废除政党支出上限
summary: The US Supreme Court threw out longstanding federal limits on spending by political parties in coordination with candidates, in a ruling likely to help Republicans in the November midterms. This was a 6-3 decision. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall is live at the Supreme Court, Bloomberg's David Westin provides instant analysis.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Supreme Court Voids Political-Party Spending Caps in GOP Win
title_cn: 最高法院在共和党获胜后废除政党支出上限
summary: The US Supreme Court threw out longstanding federal limits on spending by political parties in coordination with candidates, in a ruling likely to help Republicans in the November midterms.

title: Warsh Will Get More Leeway From Trump When It Comes to Rates, Rubenstein Says
title_cn: 鲁宾斯坦表示，沃什在利率问题上将获得特朗普更多回旋余地
summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh will get more leeway than Jay Powell did when it comes to interest rates from President Donald Trump, David Rubenstein says. He says Warsh is independent, but clearly has a mandate not to raise rates "all that much." Rubenstein, the founder and co-chairman of the Carlyle Group and host of "Bloomberg Wealth," speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Savings Accounts Are a 'Home Run,' Schwab CEO Says
title_cn: 施瓦布首席执行官表示，特朗普储蓄账户是“本垒打”
summary: Charles Schwab President & CEO Rick Wurster discusses the new Trump accounts, and how Schwab plans to support the program when it becomes available to financial firms. He also shares his outlook on the economy, geopolitical uncertainty, and the Federal Reserve, explaining why he believes investors should focus less on headlines and more on staying invested for the long term. He's on this week's episode of Bloomberg Wealth. This interview was recorded May 1 in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romanian President Won’t Pick New Premier Without Majority Deal
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统不会在没有多数协议的情况下选出新总理
summary: Romania’s president said he won’t nominate a new prime minister until political parties strike a deal to form a parliamentary majority, a move needed to break a months-long deadlock that’s stalled vital reforms tied to European Union funding.

title: Squeezed UK Defense Plan Leaves Many Hard Choices to Burnham
title_cn: 英国国防计划受到挤压，伯纳姆面临许多艰难选择
summary: The UK’s defense spending plan leaves several hard choices for Andy Burnham to make on the future security of the nation.

title: Hegseth Cuts to Weapons Testing Office Hurt Oversight, GAO Says
title_cn: 美国政府问责局表示，赫格斯削减武器测试办公室的工作损害了监督
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth’s mandate to slash by more than 75% the staff and senior officials of the decades-old Pentagon weapons testing office has “impaired oversight activities,” according to a new congressionally mandated assessment.

title: Superyacht Linked to Usmanov Ruled Not Under EU Sanctions
title_cn: 与乌斯马诺夫有关的超级游艇不受欧盟制裁
summary: A superyacht linked to Russian billionaire Alisher Usmanov’s family can no longer be considered frozen under the European Union’s sanctions regime, a Frankfurt court ruled, allowing the shipyard maintaining the vessel to seek payment for years of maintenance.

title: US Seeking ‘Tech Force’ Engineers to Embed Across Armed Forces
title_cn: 美国寻求“科技力量”工程师融入武装部队
summary: The Trump administration announced plans to recruit engineers to fill “high-impact technical roles” at the Defense Department, the latest step in its bid to bring a more Silicon Valley mindset to the government.

title: Russia Boosts Crude Oil Exports to Record While Prices Tumble
title_cn: 俄罗斯原油出口量创历史新高，但价格暴跌
summary: Despite surging shipments, Moscow's oil earnings have dropped to the lowest since March

title: Bessent Says Only China Buying Iranian Oil, Others Are Wary
title_cn: 贝森特称只有中国购买伊朗石油，其他国家持谨慎态度
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said that most nations aren’t yet ready to purchase Iranian oil, wary over the potential of the US reimposing sanctions, and that this is an incentive for Tehran to negotiate with Washington.

title: Witkoff, Kushner Set to Hold Indirect Talks With Iran in Qatar
title_cn: 威特科夫和库什纳将在卡塔尔与伊朗举行间接会谈
summary: Qatar said Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff had arrived in Doha as part of ongoing peace negotiations between the US and Iran and as the countries try to calm tensions over the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Colorado Is Next Test for Leftist Insurgents Toppling Democrats
title_cn: 科罗拉多州是左翼叛乱分子推翻民主党的下一个考验
summary: The political forces that pulled the New York congressional delegation significantly further to the left last week are making a similar run at Colorado today in races up and down ballots.

title: France's Far Right Vows Aircon For Masses As Heat Turns Political
title_cn: 随着热浪转向政治，法国极右翼誓言为大众提供空调
summary: France’s far right is promising air conditioners now, rather than climate solutions for later, to try and sway voters as Europe bakes under record temperatures.

title: Starmer Says Defense Plan Allows Burnham to Counter UK Threats
title_cn: 斯塔默表示，国防计划使伯纳姆能够应对英国的威胁
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he was confident his likely successor, Andy Burnham, would maintain the UK’s commitment to defense, as he laid out plans to invest an extra £15 billion ($20 billion) to modernize the British military.
